name: ui-platformer-board
description: PlatformerBoard — game-shell with keyboard input (LEFT/RIGHT/JUMP/STOP) and physics tick; HUD shows Score/Lives with PLAY_AGAIN control.

emits.description: Tile click passthrough — platformer is keyboard-driven; click coordinates for jump target

Move-left intent (keyboard keyMap or d-pad directionEvents)
Move-right intent (keyboard keyMap or d-pad directionEvents)
Jump intent (keyboard keyMap or d-pad directionEvents)
Stop-horizontal intent (keyboard keyUpMap or d-pad directionReleaseEvents)
